special_abilities.name: Increased Carrying Capacity
special_abilities.desc: The wonder can carry up to 100 pounds.

special_abilities.name: Wind-Up Operation
special_abilities.desc: The wonder has the Unconscious condition until another creature winds it with the wonder's unique key for 1 minute. Once wound, the wonder operates for 24 hours or until a creature touches the wonder with its key as a Utilize action to deactivate it.

bonus_actions.name: Chime
bonus_actions.desc: The wonder chirps a merry, metronomic tune. One ally it can see within 60 feet has Advantage on the next ability check it makes with a Musical Instrument or Tinker's Tools until the start of the wonder's next turn.

bonus_actions.name: Sprint
bonus_actions.desc: The wonder takes the Dash action.

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb (Hybrid or Spider Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The aranea can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

special_abilities.name: Web Walker
special_abilities.desc: The aranea ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The aranea makes two attacks, using Bite, Slam, or Sling in any combination.

actions.name: Bite (Hybrid or Spider Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Sling (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 30/120 ft. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: The aranea casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12): At Will: Friends, Silent Image; 1/Day: Hold Person.

bonus_actions.name: Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The aranea shape-shifts into a humanoid form, into a humanoid-spider hybrid form, or back into its true spider form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except where noted.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious (Sea Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The beast breathes air and water.

special_abilities.name: Divine Immortality
special_abilities.desc: If the beast dies, its body dissolves into black goo, and it gains a new body after 1d10 days, reviving with all its Hit Points in a place of Malar's choosing.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the beast fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The beast has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.desc: The beast regains 20 Hit Points at the start of its turn. If the beast takes Radiant damage or damage from a Critical Hit, this trait doesn't function at the start of the beast's next turn. The beast dies only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The beast makes three attacks, using Bite or Claws in any combination.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 23 (4d8 + 5) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws (Land or Sky Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it has the Prone condition.

bonus_actions.name: Recuperative Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The beast shape-shifts into its land form, sea form, or sky form and regains 9 (2d8) Hit Points. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except where noted.

name: Biha Babir
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 120 ft.; Passive Perception 17

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: Biha Babir can breathe air and water.

special_abilities.name: Elemental Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If Biha Babir dies outside the Elemental Plane of Water, her body dissolves into brine, and she gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all her Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Water.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If Biha Babir fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Wishes
special_abilities.desc: Biha Babir knows the Wish spell but can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish she can understand. She can cast it three times before it's unavailable for 365 days.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Biha Babir makes two Marine Burst attacks. She can replace one with a Tail attack.

actions.name: Marine Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) Cold damage.

actions.name: Tail (Marid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 15 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Huge or smaller, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Create or Destroy Water, Detect Magic, Major Image; 2/Day Each: Control Water (Flood/Part/Redirect only), Dispel Magic, Invisibility; 1/Day Each: Control Weather, Plane Shift.

bonus_actions.name: Fluid Form
bonus_actions.desc: Biha Babir shape-shifts into a form resembling a Beast or Humanoid that is Medium or smaller, retaining her statistics (other than size), or returns to her true marid form.

legendary_actions.name: Misty Burst
legendary_actions.desc: Biha Babir teleports to an unoccupied space she can see within 30 feet and makes one Marine Burst attack.

legendary_actions.name: Whirlpool
legendary_actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation. Failure: 10 (3d6) Force damage, and the target is pulled 15 feet straight toward Biha Babir. Success: Half damage only.

special_abilities.name: Determined Survivor
special_abilities.desc: The cultist regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it is Bloodied and has at least 1 Hit Point.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The cultist makes three attacks using Gauntlet or Oppressive Burst in any combination. It can replace one attack with Spellcasting to cast Dominate Person, if available.

actions.name: Gauntlet
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Oppressive Burst
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 120 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target can't take Reactions until the start of the cultist's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: 2/Day Each: Calm Emotions, Detect Thoughts; 1/Day: Dominate Person (spell save DC 16).

reactions.name: Counterattack
reactions.desc: Trigger: The cultist is hit by an attack roll. Response: The cultist makes one Gauntlet or Oppressive Burst attack against the triggering creature.

special_abilities.name: Blood-Soaked Resolve
special_abilities.desc: While Bloodied, the cultist has Advantage on saving throws.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The cultist makes three Cursed Blade attacks. It can replace one with Spellcasting.

actions.name: Cursed Blade
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +7 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. or range 20/80 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage. The blade magically returns to the cultist's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: 2/Day: Mind Spike (spell save DC 14); 1/Day Each: Dimension Door, Mislead.

special_abilities.name: Nearer to the Dead
special_abilities.desc: While Bloodied, the cultist has Immunity to the Frightened and Poisoned conditions.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The cultist makes three Necrotic Burst attacks.

actions.name: Necrotic Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 27 (5d10) Necrotic damage and the target can't regain Hit Points until the end of the cultist's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Speak with Dead, Thaumaturgy; 1/Day Each: Animate Dead, Circle of Death (spell save DC 17, using Intelligence).

special_abilities.name: Culling Aura
special_abilities.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each Bloodied creature in a 30-foot Emanation at the end of the scion's turn. Failure: The target can't regain Hit Points until the start of the scion's next turn.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the scion fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The scion has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The scion makes two attacks, using Death Touch or Mindwrack Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Death Touch
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Mindwrack Bolt
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +12, range 120 ft. Hit: 21 (6d6) Psychic damage and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the scion's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic; 2/Day Each: Dimension Door, Invisibility, Scrying; 1/Day Each: Circle of Death, Create Undead (spell save DC 20, using Charisma).

legendary_actions.name: Attack
legendary_actions.desc: The scion makes a Death Touch or Mindwrack Bolt attack.

legendary_actions.name: Command
legendary_actions.desc: The scion casts Command (level 2 version). Can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

name: Deep Dragon Wyrmling
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft.; Passive Perception 15

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 7 (2d6) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

name: Young Deep Dragon
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 150 ft.; Passive Perception 18

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 22 (4d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

name: Adult Deep Dragon
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 150 ft.; Passive Perception 21

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage plus 5 (1d10) Poison damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 38 (7d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

bonus_actions.name: Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The dragon shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Small or Medium Beast, or it returns to its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form.

legendary_actions.name: Pounce
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon moves up to half its Speed and makes one Rend attack.

legendary_actions.name: Spore Salvo
legendary_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature within 30 feet. Failure: 13 (3d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success (1 minute max).

name: Ancient Deep Dragon
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 300 ft.; Passive Perception 26

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 15 ft. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) Slashing damage plus 5 (1d10) Poison damage.

actions.name: Nightmare Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: 44 (8d10) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

bonus_actions.name: Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The dragon shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Small or Medium Beast, or returns to its true form.

legendary_actions.name: Pounce
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon moves up to half its Speed and makes one Rend attack.

legendary_actions.name: Spore Salvo
legendary_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, one creature within 30 feet. Failure: 16 (3d10) Poison damage and Poisoned condition, repeating save at end of each of its turns (1 minute max).

special_abilities.name: Fey Ancestry
special_abilities.desc: The drow has Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put it to sleep.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

actions.name: Rapier
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Drow Hand Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 30/120 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage, and the target makes a DC 12 Constitution save or is Poisoned for 1 hour. If the target fails by 5 or more, it is also Unconscious while Poisoned.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Dancing Lights; 1/Day: Faerie Fire (spell save DC 11, using Charisma).

special_abilities.name: Fey Ancestry
special_abilities.desc: The drow has Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put it to sleep.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The drow makes two attacks using Shortsword or Drow Hand Crossbow in any combination.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Drow Hand Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +7, range 30/120 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage. DC 15 Constitution save or Poisoned for 1 hour (and Unconscious while Poisoned).

bonus_actions.name: Underdark Magic (3/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The drow casts Darkness, Faerie Fire, or Levitate (self only), using Charisma (spell save DC 12).

special_abilities.name: Fey Ancestry
special_abilities.desc: The drow has Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put it to sleep.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The drow makes three Abyssal Burst attacks.

actions.name: Abyssal Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 21 (4d8 + 3) Poison damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Dancing Lights, Mage Armor (included in AC), Mage Hand, Minor Illusion; 1/Day: Summon Fiend (demon only). Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit).

bonus_actions.name: Underdark Magic (3/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The drow casts Faerie Fire or Misty Step, using the same spellcasting ability.

special_abilities.name: Fey Ancestry
special_abilities.desc: The drow has Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put it to sleep.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the drow has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The drow makes three Scourge attacks.

actions.name: Scourge
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 17 (5d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Dancing Lights, Guidance, Thaumaturgy. Uses Wisdom.

actions.name: Spider Vortex (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each enemy in a 20-foot Emanation. Failure: 33 (6d10) Piercing damage, and Restrained until the start of the drow's next turn. Success: Half damage.

bonus_actions.name: Lolth's Blessing (3/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The drow casts Cure Wounds, Darkness, Dispel Magic, or Lesser Restoration using Wisdom.

special_abilities.name: Evasion
special_abilities.desc: If Karas is subjected to an effect that allows her to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, she instead takes no damage if she succeeds and only half damage if she fails. She can't use this trait if she has the Incapacitated condition.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If Karas fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Karas makes two attacks using Dread Dagger or Tyrant's Blade in any combination.

actions.name: Dread Dagger
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage. The dagger returns to Karas's hand after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Tyrant's Blade
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) Slashing damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of Karas's next turn. If already Frightened, it instead takes 10 (3d6) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Friends, Silence, Thaumaturgy; 2/Day: Ray of Sickness (level 5); 1/Day: Blight, Mislead. Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit).

bonus_actions.name: Withdraw
bonus_actions.desc: Karas moves up to half her Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks and takes the Hide action.

legendary_actions.name: Harrow
legendary_actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature within 90 feet. Failure: 10 (3d6) Psychic damage and Frightened for 1 minute (Speed 0 while Frightened; repeats save at end of each turn).

legendary_actions.name: Stealth Attack
legendary_actions.desc: Karas makes one Dread Dagger attack and uses Withdraw.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: Manshoon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Manshoon makes three Arcane Burst attacks. He can replace two attacks with Spellcasting.

actions.name: Arcane Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +11, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 32 (4d12 + 6) Force damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Light, Lightning Bolt (level 4), Mage Armor (included), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation; 2/Day Each: Scrying, Sending, Wall of Force; 1/Day Each: Befuddlement, Clone, Finger of Death, Mind Blank, Simulacrum. Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 19).

reactions.name: Protective Magic
reactions.desc: Manshoon casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the triggering spell.

name: Nimblewright Guard
languages: Understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Evasion
special_abilities.desc: If subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the nimblewright takes no damage if it succeeds and only half if it fails, provided it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The nimblewright makes three attacks using Scimitar or Clockwork Crossbow in any combination.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Clockwork Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: Trigger: The nimblewright is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The nimblewright adds 2 to its AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss.

name: Nimblewright Hulk
languages: Understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Evasion
special_abilities.desc: If subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the nimblewright takes no damage if it succeeds and only half if it fails, provided it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The nimblewright has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The nimblewright makes four attacks using Halting Slam or Radiant Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Halting Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Radiant Ray
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +7, range 60 ft. Hit: 14 (4d6) Radiant damage.

name: Nimblewright Steed
languages: Understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Evasion
special_abilities.desc: If subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the nimblewright takes no damage if it succeeds and only half if it fails, provided it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the nimblewright moved at least 20 feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 4 (1d8) Bludgeoning damage and, if Huge or smaller, has the Prone condition.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Movement
bonus_actions.desc: The nimblewright takes the Disengage action.

name: Phaerimm Hatchling
languages: Understands Common and Deep Speech but can't speak; telepathy 30 ft.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The phaerimm has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The phaerimm makes two Stinger attacks.

actions.name: Stinger
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Thoughts, Mage Hand. Uses Charisma (spell save DC 12).

name: Phaerimm Agent
languages: Understands Common and Deep Speech but can't speak; telepathy 120 ft.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The phaerimm has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The phaerimm makes three attacks using Dread Stinger or Mindwarp Ray in any combination.

actions.name: Dread Stinger
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 13 (2d12) Poison damage.

actions.name: Mindwarp Ray
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +7, range 120 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the phaerimm's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Mage Hand; 1/Day Each: Clairvoyance, Major Image, Synaptic Static. Uses Charisma (spell save DC 15).

bonus_actions.name: Teleport
bonus_actions.desc: The phaerimm teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

reactions.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)
reactions.desc: The phaerimm casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the triggering spell.

special_abilities.name: Misty Slithering
special_abilities.desc: The serpent can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The serpent makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Cold damage.

actions.name: Constrict
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 14, one Medium or smaller creature within 10 feet. Failure: 3 (1d6) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Cold damage. The target has the Grappled and Restrained conditions (escape DC 14).

special_abilities.name: Inspiring Presence
special_abilities.desc: Creatures of Forfallen's choice (excluding herself) in a 30-foot Emanation have Advantage on attack rolls. She can't use this trait if she has the Incapacitated condition.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: Forfallen has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Forfallen makes three attacks using Greataxe or Handaxe in any combination.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Handaxe
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 22 (5d6 + 5) Slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Rust's Grip
bonus_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature within 20 feet (Disadvantage if Poisoned). First Failure: Restrained (save at end of next turn to end). Second Failure: Petrified (becomes a statue of rusted iron).

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Rusted makes three attacks using Slam or Rusted Shot Put in any combination.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 20 (4d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Rusted Shot Put
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 60/240 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

reactions.name: Rust-Riddled Hide
reactions.desc: Trigger: The Rusted is hit by an attack roll that deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage. Response — Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, each creature of the Rusted's choice in a 5-foot Emanation. Failure: Poisoned condition until the end of the target's next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Rusted makes two attacks using Greatsword or Javelin in any combination.

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the Rusted fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Rusted makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 20 ft. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Steam Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 19, each creature and flammable object in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 45 (7d12) Fire damage, and the target starts burning. Success: Half damage only. Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

bonus_actions.name: Encasing Rust
bonus_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19, one creature within 20 feet. Failure: 14 (4d6) Poison damage, and Poisoned until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

name: Sammaster (Dracolich Form)
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft.; Passive Perception 26

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If Sammaster fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Life Suppression
special_abilities.desc: Creatures within 60 feet of Sammaster can't regain Hit Points.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: Sammaster has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Soul Gem
special_abilities.desc: Sammaster has a magical soul gem as his dracolich heart. The gem can't be damaged or removed until he is reduced to 0 Hit Points. If reduced to 0 HP, his dracolich form dissolves to dust, and after 1d10 days he revives (in lich form) in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of his soul gem. The gem is a Tiny object with AC 20, HP 50, and immunity to Acid, Necrotic, Poison, and Psychic. The gem regains all its HP at the end of every turn, but turns to dust if reduced to 0 HP.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Sammaster makes three Rend attacks. He can replace one attack with Spellcasting to cast Blight or Ray of Sickness (level 6).

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) Slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Corroding Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: 52 (8d12) Acid or Necrotic damage (Sammaster's choice). Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Blight, Detect Magic, Dispel Magic, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation, Ray of Sickness (level 6); 2/Day Each: Dimension Door, Speak with Dead; 1/Day Each: Create Undead (level 8), Power Word Kill. Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 21, +13 to hit).

legendary_actions.name: Pounce
legendary_actions.desc: Sammaster moves up to half his Speed and makes one Rend attack.

legendary_actions.name: Sickening Ray
legendary_actions.desc: Sammaster casts Ray of Sickness (level 6 version).

legendary_actions.name: Terrifying Presence
legendary_actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 21, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation. Failure: 13 (2d12) Psychic damage and Frightened until the end of its next turn. Can't use again until start of his next turn.

name: Sammaster (Lich Form)
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft.; Passive Perception 19

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If Sammaster fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Life Suppression
special_abilities.desc: Creatures within 60 feet of Sammaster can't regain Hit Points.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: Sammaster has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Soul Gem
special_abilities.desc: If reduced to 0 Hit Points while his magical soul gem exists, his lich form dissolves to dust. After 1d10 days, he appears in the space of his soul gem, using the Sammaster (Dracolich Form) stat block. The gem is Tiny with AC 20, HP 50, immunity to Acid/Necrotic/Poison/Psychic. If the gem is destroyed, Sammaster can create a new one via an 8-hour ritual consuming a gem worth 1,000+ GP and 5,000 GP.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Sammaster makes three attacks using Corrosive Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination. He can replace two attacks with Spellcasting.

actions.name: Corrosive Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +13, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 38 (5d12 + 6) Acid or Necrotic damage (his choice).

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 5 ft. Hit: 16 (3d6 + 6) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of Sammaster's next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Cone of Cold, Detect Magic, Dispel Magic, Invisibility, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation; 2/Day Each: Speak with Dead, Wall of Force; 1/Day Each: Create Undead (level 8), Disintegrate, Power Word Kill. Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 21).

legendary_actions.name: Deathly Teleport
legendary_actions.desc: Sammaster teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space he can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space he left takes 19 (3d12) Necrotic damage.

legendary_actions.name: Dissolve
legendary_actions.desc: Sammaster makes one Corrosive Burst attack.

legendary_actions.name: Terrifying Presence
legendary_actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 21, each creature in a 20-foot Emanation. Failure: 13 (2d12) Psychic damage and Frightened until end of its next turn. Can't use again until start of his next turn.

reactions.name: Protective Magic
reactions.desc: Sammaster casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the triggering spell.

name: Spirit Dragon Wyrmling
senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft.; Passive Perception 12

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 13 (3d8) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature not currently affected by this breath in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target's Speed is halved, it can't take Reactions, and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. It repeats the save at end of each of its turns (1 minute max).

name: Young Spirit Dragon
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 120 ft.; Passive Perception 15

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one with Time-Warping Breath.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 36 (8d8) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature not currently affected in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: Speed halved, can't take Reactions, can take only an action or Bonus Action per turn (not both). Repeats save at end of each turn (1 minute max).

name: Adult Spirit Dragon
senses: Blindsight 30 ft., Darkvision 120 ft.; Passive Perception 17

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one with Time-Warping Breath or Spellcasting to cast Thunderwave.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 63 (14d8) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Magic, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid only), Thunderwave; 1/Day: Legend Lore (as an action). Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 18).

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature not currently affected in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: Speed halved, can't take Reactions, can take only action or Bonus Action (not both). Repeats save at end of each turn (1 minute max).

legendary_actions.name: Pounce
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon moves up to half its Speed and makes one Rend attack.

legendary_actions.name: Shattering Wave
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon casts Thunderwave.

legendary_actions.name: Unearth Ruins
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon magically raises ancient ruins in a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder within 120 feet. Ground becomes Difficult Terrain. Strength Saving Throw: DC 18 for each creature in the Cylinder. Failure: 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage and Prone condition.

name: Ancient Spirit Dragon
senses: Blindsight 60 ft., Darkvision 120 ft.; Passive Perception 21

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes three Rend attacks. It can replace one with Time-Warping Breath or Spellcasting to cast Thunderwave (level 2).

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +15, reach 15 ft. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Ruinous Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 22, each creature in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: 72 (16d8) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Magic, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid only), Thunderwave (level 2); 1/Day Each: Legend Lore (as an action), Sequester. Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 22).

actions.name: Time-Warping Breath
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 22, each creature not currently affected in a 90-foot Cone. Failure: Speed halved, can't take Reactions, can take only action or Bonus Action (not both). Repeats save at end of each turn (1 minute max).

legendary_actions.name: Pounce
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon moves up to half its Speed and makes one Rend attack.

legendary_actions.name: Shattering Wave
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon casts Thunderwave (level 2 version).

legendary_actions.name: Unearth Ruins
legendary_actions.desc: The dragon magically raises ancient ruins in a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder within 120 feet. Ground becomes Difficult Terrain. Strength Saving Throw: DC 22. Failure: 13 (3d8) Bludgeoning damage and Prone condition.

special_abilities.name: Explosive Core
special_abilities.desc: When the spore is subjected to Fire damage, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation takes 7 (2d6) Fire damage.

special_abilities.name: Rolling Mass
special_abilities.desc: The spore doesn't need to expend extra movement to move through Difficult Terrain.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The spore makes four Tendril attacks. Alternatively, it makes two Tendril attacks and uses Consume once.

actions.name: Tendril
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 20 ft. Hit: 11 (1d10 + 6) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Acid damage. If the target is Large or smaller, the spore pulls the target 5 feet straight toward itself.

actions.name: Consume
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 18, one Large or smaller creature within 5 feet. Failure: The target is pulled into the spore's space with the Grappled condition (escape DC 16). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Blinded and Restrained conditions and takes 17 (5d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the spore's turns. The spore can have one Large or up to nine Medium or smaller creatures Grappled at a time.

special_abilities.name: Flyby (Swan Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The swanmay doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack action when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The swanmay makes two attacks using Beak, Longbow, or Scimitar in any combination.

actions.name: Beak (Swan Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Scimitar (Humanoid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Longbow (Humanoid Form Only)
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Druidcraft, Speak with Animals (swan form only); 1/Day Each: Animal Friendship, Beast Sense, Spike Growth. Uses Wisdom (spell save DC 13).

bonus_actions.name: Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The swanmay shape-shifts into a Small swan, or it returns to its true humanoid form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except where noted.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If Valindra fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Spirit Gem
special_abilities.desc: If destroyed, Valindra re-forms in 1d10 days if her spirit gem is intact, reviving with all her Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within her lair.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Valindra makes three attacks using Eldritch Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination. She can replace two attacks with Spellcasting to cast Lightning Bolt (level 5).

actions.name: Eldritch Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) Force damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of Valindra's next turn.

actions.name: Deathly Grasp (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation. First Failure: 39 (6d12) Force damage and Restrained (repeating save to end, 1 minute max). Subsequent Failures: 39 (6d12) Necrotic damage, and Valindra gains 20 Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Fly, Invisibility, Lightning Bolt (level 5), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation; 2/Day Each: Animate Dead, Plane Shift; 1/Day Each: Cone of Cold (level 8), Finger of Death, Power Word Kill, Scrying. Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 20).

bonus_actions.name: Illusory Disguise
bonus_actions.desc: Valindra casts Disguise Self. Lasts until she drops to 30 Hit Points or fewer or uses Life-Rending Gaze. Investigation checks to discern her true appearance are made with Disadvantage.

legendary_actions.name: Disrupt Life
legendary_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each non-Undead creature in a 20-foot Emanation. Failure: 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half. Can't use again until start of her next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Eldritch Jaunt
legendary_actions.desc: Valindra makes one Eldritch Burst attack. Before or after the attack, she can teleport up to 20 feet to an unoccupied space she can see.

legendary_actions.name: Life-Rending Gaze
legendary_actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 20, one creature within 30 feet. Failure: 22 (4d10) Necrotic damage and Frightened until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

reactions.name: Protective Magic
reactions.desc: Valindra casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the triggering spell.

name: Werewyvern
languages: Common, Draconic (can't speak in wyvern form)

special_abilities.name: Flyby (Wyvern or Hybrid Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The werewyvern doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack action when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The werewyvern makes three attacks using Javelin or Rend in any combination. It can replace one with a Stinger attack.

actions.name: Javelin (Humanoid or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Stinger (Wyvern or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 16 (3d10) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the werewyvern's next turn. If the target is a Humanoid, it must make a DC 16 Constitution save or be cursed. If the cursed target drops to 0 Hit Points, it becomes a Werewyvern (20 HP) under the DM's control.

bonus_actions.name: Shape-Shift
bonus_actions.desc: The werewyvern shape-shifts into a Medium wyvern-humanoid hybrid or a Large wyvern, or returns to its true humanoid form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Zhentilar makes two attacks using Shortsword or Pistol in any combination. It can replace one attack with Knock Down.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

actions.name: Pistol
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Knock Down
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature within 5 feet. Failure: 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the Prone condition.

special_abilities.name: Aura of Dread
special_abilities.desc: Creatures in a 10-foot Emanation have their Speeds halved while in the Emanation. The Zhentilar can designate creatures to be unaffected by the aura.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Zhentilar makes three attacks using Dooming Blade or Oppressive Ray in any combination. It can replace one attack with Spellcasting.

actions.name: Dooming Blade
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Oppressive Ray
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 90 ft. Hit: 16 (3d10) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: 1/Day Each: Command, Fear. Uses Charisma (spell save DC 13).

special_abilities.name: Chardalyn Sense
special_abilities.desc: Zlan senses the emotions of anyone touching a piece of chardalyn within 100 miles of itself.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If Zlan fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: Zlan has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Next of the Seven (6/Year)
special_abilities.desc: If Zlan dies within 100 miles of a piece of chardalyn at least 4 inches long, it re-forms from that piece in 1d10 days, regaining all its Hit Points. Another lich's mind seizes control of the body.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Zlan makes three attacks using Slam or Bewildering Bolt in any combination. It can replace two attacks with Spellcasting.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. Hit: 12 (3d4 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 22 (4d10) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Bewildering Bolt
actions.desc: Ranged Attack Roll: +11, range 120 ft. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.desc: At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Mage Hand, Message; 2/Day Each: Dimension Door, Fly, Scrying; 1/Day Each: Befuddlement, Disintegrate. Uses Intelligence (spell save DC 19).

legendary_actions.name: Retaliation
legendary_actions.desc: Zlan makes one Slam or Bewildering Bolt attack.

legendary_actions.name: Stoke Paranoia
legendary_actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 19, one creature within 30 feet (Disadvantage if holding or wearing chardalyn). Failure: 27 (6d8) Psychic damage and the Charmed condition for 1 minute or until Zlan dies. While Charmed, the target doesn't act as an ally to any creature. Success: Half damage only. Can't use again until start of its next turn.

reactions.name: Counterspell
reactions.desc: Zlan casts Counterspell in response to the triggering spell.
